content: print("[\(activityType)] Push-to-start token read by SDK")
print("[\(activityType)] Push-to-start token sent to Braze")
print("[\(activityType)] Push-to-start opt-out confirmed by server")
case .activityInstance(.started(let id, let type, let tag, let source)):
case .activityInstance(.resumed(let id, let type, let tag)):
case .activityInstance(.pushTokenFlushed(let id, let type, let tag)):
print("[\(type)] Activity \(id) registered — Braze can now push updates")
case .activityInstance(.stale(let id, let type, let staleDate)):
let activity = findActivityInstance(id: id, as: BasketballActivityAttributes.self)
case .activityType(.pushToStartRegistrationFailed(let type, let isTransient, let reason)):
print("[\(type)] Push-to-start registration failed (transient, will retry): \(reason)")
case .activityInstance(.registrationFailed(let id, let type, _, let isTransient, let reason)):
print("[\(type)] Stored activity \(id) not found on resume")
case .activityInstance(.invalidPushTokenTag(let id, let type, let tag)):
print("[\(type)] Activity \(id) has invalid push token tag '\(tag)'")
